source: In-app feedback widget, support tickets, app store reviews

entries.text: Love the new Smart Insights dashboard! The data visualizations are beautiful and really helpful for tracking my projects.
Finally, a feature that actually helps me understand my team's performance. Great job PurpleMerit!
App crashed when I tried to open Smart Insights on my Android phone. Pixel 7, Android 14. Happened twice.
Haven't tried the new feature yet but the app seems a little slower than before.
Updated to the latest version. Smart Insights is a game changer for small business owners like me.
Payment failed when I tried to upgrade to Pro for Smart Insights. Got error code PM-4021. Tried 3 times.
The weekly report emails from Smart Insights are exactly what I needed. Saves me hours of manual reporting.
Smart Insights page takes forever to load. I counted 8 seconds just to see my dashboard. Unacceptable.
Crash on checkout flow when purchasing Smart Insights Pro. Samsung Galaxy S24, Android 15. Reproducible every time.
Really impressed with the AI-powered recommendations in Smart Insights. Helped me identify a bottleneck I missed.
App keeps crashing since the update. Was a 5-star app, now it's barely usable. Please fix ASAP.
The new feature looks interesting but I'm not sure how to get started. Maybe add a tutorial?
API timeout when loading Smart Insights. Our team of 15 people all experience the same slowdown every morning between 8-9am.
Best update in months! Smart Insights gives me the overview I always wanted. Keep it up!
Charts in Smart Insights don't render properly on iPad. Everything is overlapping and unreadable.
Payment page shows 'Internal Server Error' when I click Subscribe for Smart Insights Pro. Chrome on macOS.
Smart Insights saved my team 3 hours this week alone. The automated alerts are brilliant.
Feature seems okay but it's hard to customize the dashboard. Would be nice to rearrange widgets.
App crashes immediately when I try to export report to PDF from Smart Insights. iPhone 15, iOS 18.
The predictive analytics in Smart Insights are surprisingly accurate. Helped me plan my Q2 strategy.
Every time I open the app it's slow now. And when I try to pay for premium features it fails. Going to switch to a competitor.
Smart Insights is exactly what was missing from PurpleMerit. The competitive benchmarking feature is outstanding.
Crash on Smart Insights when applying date filter. Happens specifically with custom date range. Android 14.
Slow API response is making Smart Insights unusable during business hours. Takes 10+ seconds to load any chart.
I don't use the new feature much but the rest of the app still works fine for me.
Payment declined error PM-4021 again. My card works fine elsewhere. This is the 5th time I've tried this week.
After the initial slowness, Smart Insights works great. The data export to CSV is super useful for our accounting team.
Why does the app need to reload everything when I switch between tabs? It loses all my Smart Insights filters.
Updated review: Smart Insights is growing on me. Initial bugs seem to be getting fixed. Bumping my rating back to 4 stars.
Our enterprise account can't access Smart Insights at all. Getting 403 Forbidden error. We're on the Enterprise plan.
The feature is okay but nothing revolutionary. I expected more from the marketing hype.
I really appreciate the real-time notifications from Smart Insights. Caught an anomaly in our sales data before it became a problem.
Smart Insights crashes every time I scroll down past the third chart. Consistent repro on both Chrome and Firefox.
The app has become significantly slower since the Smart Insights update. Even pages without Smart Insights load slow now.
Smart Insights' custom reports are incredible. I can finally create exactly the reports my stakeholders want.
